---
title: "besg_1_screening"
subtitle: "`besg_1_screening`"
description: "besg_1_screening"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besg_1_screening/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                                 | Title                                                                                                                             | Type    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                              | The unique name of the event                                                                                                      | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `center`                                             | Research center                                                                                                                   | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `date_v1`                                            | date_v1                                                                                                                           | date    | Date of visit. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `staff_initials_v1`                                  | staff_initials_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the screening. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `identified_name_cpr_v1`                             | identified_name_cpr_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                  |
| `relative_v1`                                        | relative_v1                                                                                                                       | string  | Whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                  |
| `relative_name_v1`                                   | relative_name_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Specifies the accompanying relative or support person present at the visit. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                         |
| `aim_screening_v1`                                   | aim_screening_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Whether the purpose of the screening visit has been explained by the study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                            |
| `consent_info_read_v1`                               | consent_info_read_v1                                                                                                              | string  | Whether the participant has read the written information. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `consent_info_given_v1`                              | consent_info_given_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether the participant has been informed about the purpose of the study and what it involves. Visit 1.                                                                                                                               |
| `consent_24h_reflection_v1`                          | consent_24h_reflection_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Whether the participant has been informed of their right to a minimum of 24 hours to consider participation. Visit 1.                                                                                                                 |
| `consent_24h_reflection_use_v1`                      | consent_24h_reflection_use_v1                                                                                                     | string  | States if the participant wishes to use the 24-hour rule. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `consent_24h_reflection_date_planned_participant_v1` | consent_24h_reflection_date_planned_participant_v1                                                                                | string  | Verifies that the 24-hour reflection follow-up appointment is scheduled in the participant's calendar. Visit 1.                                                                                                                       |
| `consent_24h_reflection_date_planned_staff_v1`       | consent_24h_reflection_date_planned_staff_v1                                                                                      | string  | Verifies that the 24-hour reflection follow-up appointment is scheduled in the staff's calendar. Visit 1.                                                                                                                             |
| `consent_questions_asked_v1`                         | consent_questions_asked_v1                                                                                                        | string  | Whether the participant has been asked if there is any questions. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `consent_time_commitment_asked_v1`                   | consent_time_commitment_asked_v1                                                                                                  | string  | Whether the participant has been asked if the time requirement for the study is realistic. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                   |
| `consent_signed_v1`                                  | consent_signed_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Whether the participant has signed the declaration of consent. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `staff_signed_consent_v1`                            | staff_signed_consent_v1                                                                                                           | string  | Whether the staff member has signes the declaration of consent. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                              |
| `consent_copy_taken_v1`                              | consent_copy_taken_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether there has been made a copy of the written consent. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `consent_copy_given_v1`                              | consent_copy_given_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether the participant has received a copy of the written consent. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `consent_original_filed_v1`                          | consent_original_filed_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Whether the written consent has been saved on the L-drev. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `contact_other_trials_v1`                            | contact_other_trials_v1                                                                                                           | string  | Participant's consent to future contact regarding other research studies, recorded verbally and documented in REDCap. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                               |
| `wants_results_v1`                                   | wants_results_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Participant's preference regarding receiving their personal study results, recorded verbally and documented in REDCap. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                              |
| `age_v1`                                             | age_v1                                                                                                                            | number  | Age of participant. V1.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `height_v1`                                          | height_v1                                                                                                                         | number  | Participant's height in meters, measured with a stadiometer to the nearest 0.1 cm. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                           |
| `weight_v1`                                          | weight_v1                                                                                                                         | number  | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using a digital scale. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Visit 1.                                                                                                       |
| `bmi_v1`                                             | bmi_v1                                                                                                                            | string  | Body Mass Index (BMI) in kg/m², calculated from weight and height. Visit 1. Derived using the formula: round(([weight_v1])/(([height_v1])^(2)), 1)                                                                                    |
| `bmi_eligible_v1`                                    | bmi_eligible_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Indicates whether the participant meets the BMI inclusion criterion. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                |
| `t2d_diagnose_v1`                                    | t2d_diagnose_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Diagnosis status of type 2 diabetes. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `t2d_duration_v1`                                    | t2d_duration_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Number of years since participant was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes. Visit 1. Derived using the formula: [stamdata_arm_1][t2d_duration_stamdata]                                                                                     |
| `weight_change_v1`                                   | weight_change_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Participant's self-reported weight stability over the past 3 months (±3 kg). Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `weight_change_3months_v1`                           | weight_change_3months_v1                                                                                                          | number  | Participant's self-reported weight change over the past 3 months, stated in kilograms (gain or loss). Visit 1.                                                                                                                        |
| `insulin_use_v1`                                     | insulin_use_v1                                                                                                                    | string  | Insulin treatment status within the past 6 months (any type). Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `heart_failure_v1`                                   | heart_failure_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Presence of heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (EF < 40%) and current or planned treatment with SGLT-2 inhibitors. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                   |
| `cvd_v1`                                             | cvd_v1                                                                                                                            | string  | Established CVD with prescribed GLP-1 RA and/or SGLT-2 inhibitor. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `kidney_disease_v1`                                  | kidney_disease_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Chronic kidney disease defined as eGFR < 60 mL/min/1.73 m² and/or albuminuria ≥ 30 mg/g for ≥ 3 months, with ongoing or planned SGLT-2 inhibitor therapy. Visit 1.                                                                    |
| `physical_health_v1`                                 | physical_health_v1                                                                                                                | string  | Presence of physical health problems that prevent participation in planned physical activity during the intervention. Self-reported by the participant. Visit 1.                                                                      |
| `physical_health_example_v1`                         | physical_health_example_v1                                                                                                        | string  | Description of physical health problems preventing participation in planned physical activity during the intervention. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                         |
| `training_notes_v1`                                  | training_notes_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Note any relevant physical limitations or conditions that may affect exercise participation, for example back pain or osteoarthritis of the right knee. Visit 1. Added from ID11.                                                     |
| `food_allergies_v1`                                  | food_allergies_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Presence of dietary restrictions or allergies that prevent adherence to the planned dietary intervention. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                                      |
| `food_allergies_example_v1`                          | food_allergies_example_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Description of dietary restrictions or food allergies preventing adherence to the planned diet. Self-reported by the participant. Visit 1.                                                                                            |
| `diet_notes_v1`                                      | diet_notes_v1                                                                                                                     | string  | Note any relevant dietary habits or restrictions, for example if the participant generally follows a low-carbohydrate diet. Visit 1. Added from ID11.                                                                                 |
| `pregnant_v1`                                        | pregnant_v1                                                                                                                       | string  | Participant's pregnancy status or plans to become pregnant within the next year. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                                                               |
| `pregnancy_test_result_v1`                           | pregnancy_test_result_v1                                                                                                          | string  | Indicates if the participant had a negative or positive pregnancy test. 1: Negative, 2: Positive. Visit 1.                                                                                                                            |
| `alcohol_or_substance_misuse_v1`                     | alcohol_or_substance_misuse_v1                                                                                                    | string  | Participant's history of alcohol or substance abuse, or current treatment for alcohol dependence (including pharmacological treatment). Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                        |
| `psychiatric_disease_v1`                             | psychiatric_disease_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Presence of psychiatric disease. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `psychiatric_disease_specific_v1`                    | psychiatric_disease_specific_v1                                                                                                   | string  | Specification of psychiatric disease. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `psychiatric_disease_medication_change_v1`           | psychiatric_disease_medication_change_v1                                                                                          | string  | Any changes in psychiatric medication within the last 3 months. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                              |
| `psychiatric_disease_medication_change_specific_v1`  | psychiatric_disease_medication_change_specific_v1                                                                                 | string  | Specification of changes in psychiatric medication within the last 3 months. Visit 1. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                        |
| `psychiatric_hospitalization_v1`                     | psychiatric_hospitalization_v1                                                                                                    | string  | Whether the participant has had any acute psychiatric visits or hospital admissions within the last 6 months. Visit 1.                                                                                                                |
| `psychiatric_disease_barrier_v1`                     | psychiatric_disease_barrier_v1                                                                                                    | string  | Whether the participant's mental condition (other than those previously mentioned) is considered to prevent study participation. Assed by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                       |
| `psychiatric_disease_barrier_reason_v1`              | psychiatric_disease_barrier_reason_v1                                                                                             | string  | Specify the reason why the mental condition is considered to prevent study participation. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                           |
| `binge_eating_v1`                                    | binge_eating_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Diagnosis status of binge eating disorder. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bed_q_diagnostic_score_v1`                          | bed_q_diagnostic_score_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Whether the participant meets the criteria for BED-diagnosis. Visit 1. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][bed_q_diagnostic_score]                                                                                   |
| `bed_burden_score_v1`                                | bed_burden_score_v1                                                                                                               | string  | BED burden score. Visit 1. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][bed_q_burden_score]                                                                                                                                   |
| `other_intervention_v1`                              | other_intervention_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Participation status or plans to participate in another intervention study (medical or lifestyle) involving alternative treatment. Self-reported by participant. Visit 1.                                                             |
| `language_barrier_v1`                                | language_barrier_v1                                                                                                               | string  | Participant's difficulties in understanding Danish, both written and spoken. Self-reported by participant and assessed by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                       |
| `compliance_risk_v1`                                 | compliance_risk_v1                                                                                                                | string  | Assessment of whether the participant is unlikely to comply with study procedures and/or interventions (e.g., attendance, measurements, counselling). Assessed by study staff. Visit 1.                                               |
| `compliance_risk_expl_v1`                            | compliance_risk_expl_v1                                                                                                           | string  | Notes explaining the assessment of the participant's likelihood to comply with study procedures and/or interventions. Reported by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                               |
| `medicinelist_v1`                                    | medicinelist_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Indicates if the medicine list from FMK has been reviewed with the participant and possible changes. Visit 4.                                                                                                                         |
| `metformin_dose_v1`                                  | metformin_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | number  | States the metformin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `canagliflozin_dose_v1`                              | canagliflozin_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Canagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dapagliflozin_dose_v1`                              | dapagliflozin_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Dapagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `empagliflozin_dose_v1`                              | empagliflozin_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Empagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `other_sglt2_v1`                                     | other_sglt2_v1                                                                                                                    | string  | Specifies the name of the SGLT-2 inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                             |
| `other_sglt2_dose_v1`                                | other_sglt2_dose_v1                                                                                                               | number  | States the dose of "other SGLT-2 inhibitor". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sitagliptin_dose_v1`                                | sitagliptin_dose_v1                                                                                                               | number  | States the Sitagliptin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `linagliptin_dose_v1`                                | linagliptin_dose_v1                                                                                                               | string  | States the Linagliptin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_dppiv_v1`                                     | other_dppiv_v1                                                                                                                    | string  | Specifies the name of the DPP-IV inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                             |
| `other_dppiv_dose_v1`                                | other_dppiv_dose_v1                                                                                                               | number  | States the dose of "other DPP-IV inhibitor". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `gliclazid_dose_v1`                                  | gliclazid_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | number  | States the Gliclazid dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `glimepirid_dose_v1`                                 | glimepirid_dose_v1                                                                                                                | number  | States the Glimepirid dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `other_sulfonyl_name_v1`                             | other_sulfonyl_name_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Specifies the name of the sulfonylurea if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `other_sulfonyl_dose_v1`                             | other_sulfonyl_dose_v1                                                                                                            | number  | States the dose of "other sulfonylurea". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `semaglutid_sc_dose_v1`                              | semaglutid_sc_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Semsglutid s.c. dose. Mg/week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `semaglutid_po_dose_v1`                              | semaglutid_po_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Semaglutid p.o. dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dulaglutid_sc_dose_v1`                              | dulaglutid_sc_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the Dulaglutid dose. Mg/week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `tirzepatid_dose_v1`                                 | tirzepatid_dose_v1                                                                                                                | number  | States the Tirzepatid dose. Mg/week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_glp1ra_v1`                                    | other_glp1ra_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Specifies the name of the GLP-1 receptor agonist if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                       |
| `other_glp1ra_dose_v1`                               | other_glp1ra_dose_v1                                                                                                              | number  | States the dose of "other GLP-1 receptor agonist". Mg/day or mg/week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `other_glp1ra_dose_unit_v1`                          | other_glp1ra_dose_unit_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Specifies if the dose of "other GLP-1 receptor agonist" is mg/day or mg/week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                |
| `other_antidiabetic_v1`                              | other_antidiabetic_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Specifies antidiabetics if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `other_antidiabetic_dose_v1`                         | other_antidiabetic_dose_v1                                                                                                        | number  | States the dose of "other antidiabetics". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `bendroflumethiazid_dose_v1`                         | bendroflumethiazid_dose_v1                                                                                                        | number  | States the Bendroflumethiazid with KCl dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `hydrochlorthiazid_dose_v1`                          | hydrochlorthiazid_dose_v1                                                                                                         | number  | States the Hydrochlorthiazid dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `other_thiazid_v1`                                   | other_thiazid_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Specifies the name of the thiazide if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                     |
| `other_thiazid_dose_v1`                              | other_thiazid_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the dose of "other thiazide". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `amlodipin_dose_v1`                                  | amlodipin_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | number  | States the Amlodipin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `lercanidipin_dose_v1`                               | lercanidipin_dose_v1                                                                                                              | number  | States the Lercanidipin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `verapamil_dose_v1`                                  | verapamil_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | States the Verapamil dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `diltiazem_dose_v1`                                  | diltiazem_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | States the Diltiazem dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `other_calciumantagonist_v1`                         | other_calciumantagonist_v1                                                                                                        | string  | Specifies the name of the calcium channel blocker if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                      |
| `othter_calciumantagonist_dose_v1`                   | othter_calciumantagonist_dose_v1                                                                                                  | number  | States the dose of "other calcium channel blocker". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `enalapril_dose_v1`                                  | enalapril_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | number  | States the Enalapril dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `ramipril_dose_v1`                                   | ramipril_dose_v1                                                                                                                  | number  | States the Ramipril dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `other_ace_v1`                                       | other_ace_v1                                                                                                                      | string  | Specifies the name of the ACE inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                |
| `other_ace_dose_v1`                                  | other_ace_dose_v1                                                                                                                 | number  | States the dose of "other ACE inhibitor". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `losartan_dose_v1`                                   | losartan_dose_v1                                                                                                                  | number  | States the Losartan dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `candesartan_dose_v1`                                | candesartan_dose_v1                                                                                                               | number  | States the Candesartan dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_angiotensin_ii_v1`                            | other_angiotensin_ii_v1                                                                                                           | string  | Specifies the name of the ARB if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `other_angiotensin_ii_dose_v1`                       | other_angiotensin_ii_dose_v1                                                                                                      | number  | States the dose of "other ARB". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `other_antihypertensiva_v1`                          | other_antihypertensiva_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Specifies antihypertensive medicine if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                    |
| `other_antihypertensiva_dose_v1`                     | other_antihypertensiva_dose_v1                                                                                                    | number  | States the dose of "other antihypertensive medicine". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `atorvastatin_dose_v1`                               | atorvastatin_dose_v1                                                                                                              | number  | States the Atorvastatin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `simvastatin_dose_v1`                                | simvastatin_dose_v1                                                                                                               | number  | States the Simvastatin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `rosuvastatin_dose_v1`                               | rosuvastatin_dose_v1                                                                                                              | number  | States the Rosuvastatin dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `gemfibrozil_dose_v1`                                | gemfibrozil_dose_v1                                                                                                               | string  | States the Gemfibrozil dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `ezetimib_dose_v1`                                   | ezetimib_dose_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | States the Ezetimib dose. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `other_statins_v1`                                   | other_statins_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Specifies the name of statins if not reported on the provided list. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `other_statins_dose_v1`                              | other_statins_dose_v1                                                                                                             | number  | States the dose of "other statins". Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `other_medicine_v1`                                  | other_medicine_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Indicates if the participant takes any other medicine apart from antidiabetic and antihypertensive drugs. Visit 4.                                                                                                                    |
| `other_medicine_name_v1`                             | other_medicine_name_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Specifies the brand names of other medications used by the participant. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                      |
| `other_medicine_content_v1`                          | other_medicine_content_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Specifies the generic names of other medications used by the participant. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                    |
| `other_medicine_dose_v1`                             | other_medicine_dose_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Specifies the doses of other medications used by the participant. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `supplements_v1`                                     | supplements_v1                                                                                                                    | string  | Indicates if the participant takes any nutritional supplements e.g. vitamins or minerals. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                    |
| `supplements_name_v1`                                | supplements_name_v1                                                                                                               | string  | States the names of nutritional supplements. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `supplements_content_v1`                             | supplements_content_v1                                                                                                            | string  | States the composition of nutritional supplements. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `supplements_dose_v1`                                | supplements_dose_v1                                                                                                               | string  | States the doses of nutritional supplements. Mg/day. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `medicine_list_physical_v1`                          | medicine_list_physical_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Medicin list placed in the folder with ID-number. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `medicine_list_upload_v1`                            | medicine_list_upload_v1                                                                                                           | string  | The reviewed medcine list incl. notes. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `medicine_doctor_v1`                                 | medicine_doctor_v1                                                                                                                | string  | Indicates whether the medicine list needs to be reviewed by a doctor. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `medicine_doctor_review_v1`                          | medicine_doctor_review_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Indicates if the medicine list has been reviewed by a doctor. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `screening_complete_v1`                              | screening_complete_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether the screening instrument is completed.. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `inclusion_criteria_met_v1`                          | inclusion_criteria_met_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Whether the inclusion criterias were met. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `exclusion_criteria_reviewed_v1`                     | exclusion_criteria_reviewed_v1                                                                                                    | string  | Whether the exclusion criterias are reviewed. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `stamdata_complete_v1`                               | stamdata_complete_v1                                                                                                              | string  | Whether all the necessary data is registered in stamdata. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `inclusion_v1`                                       | inclusion_v1                                                                                                                      | string  | Assessment of participant eligibility for inclusion in the ON LiMiT feasibility study, based on screening. Asssed by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                            |
| `inclusion_assessment_expl_v1`                       | inclusion_assessment_expl_v1                                                                                                      | string  | Notes explaining whether the participant can be included in the ON LiMiT feasibility study. Reported by study staff. Visit 1                                                                                                          |
| `blood_sample_taken_v1`                              | blood_sample_taken_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether participant had a blood sample taken. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `blood_sample_not_v1`                                | blood_sample_not_v1                                                                                                               | string  | Reason to why the bloodsample has not been taken. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                   |
| `comment_blood_sample_v1`                            | comment_blood_sample_v1                                                                                                           | string  | Comments regarding the bloodsample. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `hba1c_value_v1`                                     | hba1c_value_v1                                                                                                                    | number  | Participant's HbA1c in mmol/mol, assessed from blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                  |
| `gad65_value_v1`                                     | gad65_value_v1                                                                                                                    | string  | Participants GAD65 assessed from blood sample collected in non-fastin state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `gad65_waiting_v1`                                   | gad65_waiting_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | If GAD65 results are pending: Complete as much as possible during the screening visit. Schedule a follow-up phone call. Visit 1.                                                                                                      |
| `cpeptid_value_v1`                                   | cpeptid_value_v1                                                                                                                  | number  | Participant's C-peptid in pmol/L, assessed from blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                 |
| `glucose_value_v1`                                   | glucose_value_v1                                                                                                                  | number  | Participant's glucose, assessed fom blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                             |
| `ecg_performed_v1`                                   | ecg_performed_v1                                                                                                                  | string  | Record wether the participant has had an ECG taken. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `ecg_not_v1`                                         | ecg_not_v1                                                                                                                        | string  | Reason to why ECG has not been taken. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `egc_approved_v1`                                    | egc_approved_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Whether the ECG has been checked by a doctor. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                       |
| `visit2_scheduled_v1`                                | visit2_scheduled_v1                                                                                                               | string  | Indicate whether the participant's visit appointments have been entered into their own calendar or into Liva. Visit 1.                                                                                                                |
| `appointments_booked_outlook_calendar_v1`            | appointments_booked_outlook_calendar_v1                                                                                           | string  | Indicate whether the visit appointments for V2, V3, and V4 have been entered into the ON LiMiT calendar in Outlook. Visit 1. Added from ID15.                                                                                         |
| `appointments_booked_sp_v1`                          | appointments_booked_sp_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Indicate whether the visit appointments for V2, V3, and V4 have been booked in SP. Visit 1. Added from ID15.                                                                                                                          |
| `sp_reminder_installed_v1`                           | sp_reminder_installed_v1                                                                                                          | string  | Whether the participant has access to "Min SP" to view scheduled appointment times and receive reminders for study visits. Visit 1.                                                                                                   |
| `easy_sms_v1`                                        | easy_sms_v1                                                                                                                       | string  | Whether the participant is enrolled in nemSMS for automatic reminders of study appointments. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                 |
| `research_active_sp_v1`                              | research_active_sp_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Indicate whether the participant has been marked as research-active in SP. Visit 1. Added from ID15.                                                                                                                                  |
| `handed_out_v1`                                      | handed_out_v1                                                                                                                     | string  | States if the participant has been handed the participant folder. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `participant_folder_v1`                              | participant_folder_v1                                                                                                             | string  | Whether the information in the participant folder has been reviewed. Participant is instructed to bring the folder to each visit. Visit 1.                                                                                            |
| `participant_folder_questioins_v1`                   | participant_folder_questioins_v1                                                                                                  | string  | Whether the participant has any questions regarding the material in the participant folder. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                  |
| `study_app_installation_v1`                          | study_app_installation_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Whether the participant has the study app installed on their telephone. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                      |
| `study_app_not_installed_reason_v1`                  | study_app_not_installed_reason_v1                                                                                                 | string  | Reason as to why the study app is not installed. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `study_app_install_plan_v1`                          | study_app_install_plan_v1                                                                                                         | string  | A plan for when the study app will be installed. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `study_app_not_installed_plan_v1`                    | study_app_not_installed_plan_v1                                                                                                   | string  | Agreement with the participant regarding installation of the study app. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                      |
| `study_app_instruction_v1`                           | study_app_instruction_v1                                                                                                          | string  | Whether the participant has been instructed in using the study app and has been informed about monitoring via the study app. Visit 1.                                                                                                 |
| `diet_record_explained_v1`                           | diet_record_explained_v1                                                                                                          | string  | Whether the instructions for completing the 3-day dietary registration in MyFood24 (link) have been reviewed with the participant. Visit 1.                                                                                           |
| `myfood24_calendar_v1`                               | myfood24_calendar_v1                                                                                                              | string  | Create a calendar appointment in the ON LiMiT calendar to send the link to the participant via Liva. For example: "Send MyFood24 link to ID09". Invite the project dietitians NP and GS to the appointment. Visit 1. Added from ID11. |
| `cgm_info_v1`                                        | cgm_info_v1                                                                                                                       | string  | Whether the participant has been informed about the use of CGM. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                              |
| `cgm_v1`                                             | cgm_v1                                                                                                                            | string  | Indicates whether the participant has been fitted with a CGM. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `cgm_no_v1`                                          | cgm_no_v1                                                                                                                         | string  | The reason why, if the participant didn't get the CGM on. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sensorid_v1`                                        | sensorid_v1                                                                                                                       | string  | The sensors ID number. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `cgmreader_v1`                                       | cgmreader_v1                                                                                                                      | string  | The number of the CGM reader. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `gcm_envelop_given_v1`                               | gcm_envelop_given_v1                                                                                                              | string  | Whether the participant has received a zip bag for the CGM. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sens_download_phone_v1`                             | sens_download_phone_v1                                                                                                            | string  | Whether the participant has downloaded the SENS app to their phone. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                          |
| `sens_id_nr_v1`                                      | sens_id_nr_v1                                                                                                                     | string  | Identification of the SENS tracker. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `sens_turned_on_v1`                                  | sens_turned_on_v1                                                                                                                 | string  | Indicates if tracker is turned on and time period for measuring registred in webapp. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                         |
| `sens_applied_v1`                                    | sens_applied_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | Whether SENS device has been applied. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `sens_notapplied_reason_v1`                          | sens_notapplied_reason_v1                                                                                                         | string  | Reason why the SENS accelerometer was not applied. Recorded by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sens_application_date_v1`                           | sens_application_date_v1                                                                                                          | date    | Date of SENS application. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sens_info_v1`                                       | sens_info_v1                                                                                                                      | string  | Whether the participant has received information about SENS. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sens_patches_and_zip_given_v1`                      | sens_patches_and_zip_given_v1                                                                                                     | string  | Indicates if participant has received zip bag with extra patches. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                            |
| `stoolkit_given_visit2_v1`                           | stoolkit_given_visit2_v1                                                                                                          | string  | Whether participant has received information and materials for stool sample home collection prior to Visit 2. Visit 1.                                                                                                                |
| `info_before_mmtt_v1`                                | info_before_mmtt_v1                                                                                                               | string  | Whether the participant has been informed about the preperations for visit 2 (MMTT). Visit 1.                                                                                                                                         |
| `comments_end_v1`                                    | comments_end_v1                                                                                                                   | string  | General comments and observations recorded. Free-text notes by study staff. Visit 1.                                                                                                                                                  |
| `treatment_v1___1`                                   | Livstilbehandling (f.eks. forløb hos diætist, træningsforløb eller andet)                                                         | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or incretin based medicin (e.g. GLP-1 receptor agonist). Visit 1.                                                          |
| `treatment_v1___2`                                   | Oral antidiabetisk medicin                                                                                                        | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or incretin based medicin (e.g. GLP-1 receptor agonist). Visit 1.                                                          |
| `treatment_v1___3`                                   | Inkretinbaseret medicin (fx GLP-1 RA)                                                                                             | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or incretin based medicin (e.g. GLP-1 receptor agonist). Visit 1.                                                          |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___1`                      | Metformin                                                                                                                         | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___2`                      | SGLT-2-hæmmer (Canagliflozin (Invokana), Dapagliflozin (Forxiga), Empagliflozin (Jardiance))                                      | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___3`                      | DPP-IV-hæmmer (Sitagliptin (Januvia), Linagliptin (Trajenta))                                                                     | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___4`                      | Sulfonylurinstof (Gliclazid, Glimepirid)                                                                                          | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___5`                      | GLP-1-receptoragonist (Semaglutid s.c. (Ozempic), Semaglutid p.o. (Rybelsus), Dulaglutid s.c. (Trulicity), Tirzepatid (Mounjaro)) | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___6`                      | Andet præparat                                                                                                                    | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_v1___7`                      | Deltager tager ikke antidiabetika                                                                                                 | boolean | Lists which antidiabetic medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `sglt2_type_v1___1`                                  | Canagliflozin (Invokana)                                                                                                          | boolean | Specifies which SGLT-2 inhibitor the participant uses.
