Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_v1___2`                                  | Dapagliflozin (Forxiga)                                                                                                           | boolean | Specifies which SGLT-2 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_v1___3`                                  | Empagliflozin (Jardiance)                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which SGLT-2 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_v1___4`                                  | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which SGLT-2 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dppiv_type_v1___1`                                  | Sitagliptin (Januvia)                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which DPP-4 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dppiv_type_v1___2`                                  | Linagliptin (Trajenta)                                                                                                            | boolean | Specifies which DPP-4 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dppiv_type_v1___3`                                  | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which DPP-4 inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `sulfonyl_type_v1___1`                               | Gliclazid                                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which sulfonylurea the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `sulfonyl_type_v1___2`                               | Glimepirid                                                                                                                        | boolean | Specifies which sulfonylurea the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `sulfonyl_type_v1___3`                               | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which sulfonylurea the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `glp1ra_type_v1___1`                                 | Semaglutid s.c. (Ozempic)                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which GLP-1 receptor agonist the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_v1___2`                                 | Semaglutid p.o. (Rybelsus)                                                                                                        | boolean | Specifies which GLP-1 receptor agonist the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_v1___3`                                 | Dulaglutid s.c. (Trulicity)                                                                                                       | boolean | Specifies which GLP-1 receptor agonist the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_v1___5`                                 | Tirzepatid (Mounjaro)                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which GLP-1 receptor agonist the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_v1___4`                                 | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which GLP-1 receptor agonist the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___1`                   | Thiazid (bendroflumethiazid m. KCl, hydrochlorthiazid)                                                                            | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___2`                   | Calciumantagonist (amlodipin, lercanidipin, verapamil, diltiazem)                                                                 | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___3`                   | ACE-hæmmer (enalapril, ramipril)                                                                                                  | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___4`                   | Angiotensin-II-receptorblokker (losartan, candesartan)                                                                            | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___5`                   | Andet præparat                                                                                                                    | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_v1___6`                   | Deltager tager ikke antihypertensiva                                                                                              | boolean | Lists which antihypertensive medications the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `thiazid_type_v1___1`                                | Bendroflumethiazid m. KCl                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which thiazide the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `thiazid_type_v1___2`                                | Hydrochlorthiazid                                                                                                                 | boolean | Specifies which thiazide the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `thiazid_type_v1___3`                                | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which thiazide the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `calciumantagonist_type_v1___1`                      | Amlodipin                                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which calcium channel blocker the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_v1___2`                      | Lercanidipin                                                                                                                      | boolean | Specifies which calcium channel blocker the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_v1___3`                      | Verapamil                                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which calcium channel blocker the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_v1___4`                      | Diltiazem                                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which calcium channel blocker the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_v1___5`                      | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which calcium channel blocker the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                |
| `ace_type_v1___1`                                    | Enalapril                                                                                                                         | boolean | Specifies which ACE inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `ace_type_v1___2`                                    | Ramipril                                                                                                                          | boolean | Specifies which ACE inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `ace_type_v1___3`                                    | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which ACE inhibitor the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_v1___1`                         | Losartan                                                                                                                          | boolean | Specifies which ARB the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_v1___2`                         | Candesartan                                                                                                                       | boolean | Specifies which ARB the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_v1___3`                         | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Specifies which ARB the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___1`                            | Atorvastatin                                                                                                                      | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___2`                            | Simvastatin                                                                                                                       | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___3`                            | Rosuvastatin                                                                                                                      | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___5`                            | Gemfibrozil (Lopid)                                                                                                               | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___6`                            | Ezetimib                                                                                                                          | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___4`                            | Andet præparat                                                                                                                    | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `statins_medicine_v1___7`                            | Deltager tager ikke statiner                                                                                                      | boolean | Lists which statins the participant uses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `hba1c_gad65_cpeptid_v1___1`                         | GAD65-antistof er positiv                                                                                                         | boolean | Participant's GAD65 and/or C-peptid assessed from blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_gad65_cpeptid_v1___2`                         | C-peptid (stimuleret) < 800 pM                                                                                                    | boolean | Participant's GAD65 and/or C-peptid assessed from blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_gad65_cpeptid_v1___3`                         | Afventer svar på GAD65-antistof                                                                                                   | boolean | Participant's GAD65 and/or C-peptid assessed from blood sample collected in non-fasting state. Visit 1.                                                                                                                               |

: Fields in the `besg_1_screening` resource.
